# arubasdwan_app_port_protocols (Data Source)

Fetches the list of user-defined port/protocol classifications from the Aruba SD-WAN Orchestrator via GET /gms/rest/applicationDefinition?base=portProtocolClassification&resourceKey=userDefined.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "arubasdwan_app_port_protocols" "all" {}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Read-Only

- `port_protocol_classifications` (Attributes List) List of port/protocol classifications configured on the Orchestrator. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--port_protocol_classifications))

<a id="nestedatt--port_protocol_classifications"></a>
### Nested Schema for `port_protocol_classifications`

Read-Only:

- `description` (String) The description of the port/protocol classification.
- `disabled` (Boolean) Whether the port/protocol classification is disabled.
- `name` (String) The name of the port/protocol classification.
- `port` (Number) The port number.
- `priority` (Number) The priority of the port/protocol classification.
- `protocol` (Number) The protocol number (e.g. 6 for TCP, 17 for UDP).
